legal.readRequired: You must read Terms, Disclaimer, and Safe Transaction instructions before continuing.
legal.termsTitle1: Acceptance of Terms: By accessing Bazaar, you agree to comply with these terms.
legal.termsPoint1: You must be at least 18 years old to post advertisements. Minors are not allowed to create listings or accounts.
legal.termsPoint2: All listings must be lawful, accurate, and posted by authorized users. Users are solely responsible for the content they post. Bazaar does not guarantee the accuracy of any listing.
legal.termsPoint3: You are responsible for information, media, and pricing you submit.
legal.termsPoint4: Bazaar may remove listings that violate platform rules or local law. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate our community standards or local laws.
legal.disclaimerPoint1: Bazaar is a marketplace platform and is not a party to transactions between users.
legal.disclaimerPoint2: Users are responsible for verifying sellers, items, and payment details before any deal.
legal.safePoint1: Meet in public places and avoid isolated locations for inspection or handover.
legal.safePoint2: Do not share one-time passwords, card PINs, or account credentials.
legal.safePoint3: Inspect the item and documents carefully before making payment.
legal.safePoint4: Report suspicious activity, fake listings, or fraud attempts immediately.

postAd.success: Your listing has been posted successfully!
